description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house set on a rectangular lot with a spacious backyard featuring a tennis court and a pool. The house itself is two stories tall, with a complex gable roof and multiple window groupings, including arched windows and large rectangular panes. The front facade includes a covered entryway supported by columns, a driveway, and landscaped greenery. The rear of the property showcases a patio area adjacent to the pool, with direct access to the tennis court. The lot is bordered by fencing and includes additional landscaping elements such as trees and shrubs. The overall design emphasizes open recreational space and a blend of traditional and contemporary architectural features.
description: A large two-story modern house with a gable roof, landscaped front, and a backyard featuring a pool and tennis court. The property is fenced and includes both traditional and contemporary design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, driveway, and landscaped garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the property, tennis court, and pool area behind the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tennis court, pool, and patio area, with the house in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side elevation, fencing, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with grouped and arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with columns, steps, and landscaped approach
